settings.title: Settings
settings.headerText: Profile, avatar, notifications, security, and sign-in.

language.title: Interface language
language.text: Choose a language. It is saved for future visits and applied across the whole site.

profile.title: Profile
profile.text: The details buyers and sellers see on the platform.
profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell buyers about yourself, your experience, delivery rules, and product categories.

avatar.deleteNotice: The avatar will be removed after saving the profile.
avatar.hint: PNG, JPG, or WEBP up to 8 MB. After uploading, click "Save profile".
avatar.uploaded: Avatar uploaded. Click save to apply it to your profile.
avatar.invalidType: Choose a PNG, JPG, or WEBP image
avatar.tooLarge: The file is too large. Maximum is 8 MB.

password.title: Password
password.text: At least 8 characters, with an uppercase letter, a number, and a special character. Use the new password the next time you sign in.
password.weak: Password must contain an uppercase letter, a number, and a special character

twofa.title: Two-factor authentication
twofa.text: A code from an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.) on every sign-in.
twofa.backupIntro: 2FA is on. Save the backup codes — each can be used once instead of an app code if your phone is unavailable.
twofa.setupIntro: Scan in your authenticator app or enter the secret manually, then enter the code to confirm.

emailVerify.title: Email verification
emailVerify.text: Protect your account and unlock order notifications by email.
emailVerify.sentTo: We sent a link to {email} at registration. If it didn't arrive, send it again.
emailVerify.sent: Email sent — check your inbox (and spam folder)

phone.title: Phone verification
phone.text: Required for withdrawals. Optional for everything else on the site.
phone.codeSentTo: The code was sent to {phone}. Enter it below.

notifs.title: Notifications
notifs.text: Where to send orders, messages, disputes, and other important events.
notifs.telegramText: Requires connecting the Telegram bot below.

telegram.connectFailed: Could not get the connection link

works.title: What already works
works.item1: The avatar is uploaded as a file to the backend and stored in the profile.
works.item2: Name, email, and toggles are updated in the database.
works.item3: The session refreshes after saving, so the avatar shows up in the navigation without re-login.
